page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6a.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance type powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, utilizing the AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at a base frequency of 2.6 GHz. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and allocates a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput communication for distributed environments.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g6a.32xlarge offers high resource density for workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation and substantial memory capacity without the added cost of bundled local storage or GPU accelerators. This profile is suitable for large-scale general-purpose workloads, enterprise applications, web serving, and database hosting relying on network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6a.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance configured with 128 dedicated vCPUs and 128 physical cores on the x86_64 architecture. Powered by an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at 2.6 GHz, it operates on the KVM hypervisor with a single thread per core. The instance features 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It contains no local storage and no GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware profile provides a high-density, dedicated compute environment. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for large-scale deployments that do not require local NVMe drives or hardware acceleration. The instance is suited for enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6a.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC 7H12 vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, operating on a KVM hypervisor.

tagline: A high-density, dedicated compute instance featuring balanced memory-to-core ratios and high-speed network bandwidth for enterprise workloads.
